## Checklist

- [ ] I have run `npm run build`
- [ ] I have run `safeagent test` against the relevant example config
- [ ] I am not adding secrets, tokens, or credentials
- [ ] If this adds a test, I have documented category and severity
- [ ] I understand SafeAgentKit is a defensive testing tool
